name: SOAP Note
title_instruction: Summarize this clinical encounter in max 6 words

sections.title: Chief Complaint
sections.instruction: Patient's primary concern in their own words

sections.title: Subjective
sections.instruction: History of present illness narrative including symptoms, onset, duration, and relevant history

sections.title: Objective
sections.instruction: Clinical examination findings if mentioned, vitals, observations

sections.title: Plan
sections.instruction: Treatment steps, interventions, or action items discussed

sections.title: Medications
sections.instruction: Medications mentioned with dosage and frequency if available

sections.title: Follow-Up
sections.instruction: Follow-up instructions, return visit timeline, or referrals

sections.title: Participants
sections.instruction: Names and roles of people present (e.g. Dr. Smith, Patient Jane Doe)
